header.brand_strategy_desc: The foundation for your brand — market analysis, positioning, and communication.
header.naming_desc: Choosing a memorable, strong, and legally clear name for your brand.
header.corporate_style_desc: A system of logos, colors, and fonts that makes your brand recognizable.
header.packaging_design_desc: Attractive design that will make your product stand out on the shelf.
header.services_and_prices_desc: Build your own service package and get an instant price.

headlines: Your branding isn't selling? We'll fix it.
Stand out from the competition.
Make your brand not just "pretty", but profitable.
Make customers fall in love with you. Again and again.
From small business to a strong brand. In one step.
hero.description: We don't just draw logos. We build a results-driven, strategy-based brand system for your business that will win the hearts of your customers.

contactModal.title: For a quality consultation
contactModal.description: Answer a few questions so we can better understand your project.
contactModal.goal: Which goal is closest to you?

goalOptions.label: I'm not familiar with branding, but I think my business needs it.
I have a brand, but it's not effective; I need an analysis and consultation.
I understand the power of branding and have a specific goal.

home.cta1_title: Your brand could look this good too.
home.cta1_desc: Take your business to the next level with professional design. We'll help find the perfect solution for your business.
